file_insights.purpose: Abstract base repository class with multi-tenant support
key_patterns: Generic types for TEntity, TCreateInput, TUpdateInput
Soft delete support with notDeleted helper

file_insights.purpose: Define allowed bash commands and project stack detection

file_insights.changes: New file creation - Build status tracking
file_insights.purpose: Track project building phase and subtask progress

file_insights.changes: New file creation - Claude IDE configuration
file_insights.purpose: Sandbox and permission settings for development environment
key_patterns: MCP integration for memory and library resolution

patterns_discovered.description: All database queries automatically filter by organizationId, enforcing tenant data isolation
Deletion is logical (sets deletedAt) rather than physical, with includeDeleted flag to optionally retrieve soft-deleted records
Abstract base class with three generic type parameters for entity, create input, and update input
Uses this.prisma[this.modelName] to access Prisma models dynamically at runtime with @ts-expect-error suppression
Returns paginated results with total count, current page, items per page, and total pages
Uses Promise.all() to execute count and findMany in parallel for performance optimization
Pagination parameters are validated and normalized (min/max bounds, 1-indexed pages)
Each method includes detailed JSDoc with @param, @returns, @throws, @example sections

gotchas_discovered.description: TypeScript cannot validate dynamic Prisma model access. Code uses @ts-expect-error to suppress type checking on this.prisma[this.modelName] calls
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Runtime errors possible if modelName is invalid; should validate modelName in constructor

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: Soft delete not enforced at database level
gotchas_discovered.description: Soft delete is enforced in application code (notDeleted filter), not at database level. Direct SQL queries could bypass this
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Use only through repository methods; avoid direct database access

gotchas_discovered.description: No transaction management methods in base repository. Multi-step operations could fail partially
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Child repositories should implement transaction wrappers if needed

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: No query optimization hints for large datasets
gotchas_discovered.description: No field selection (select/projection) in queries, retrieving all fields regardless of need
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Child repositories should override methods to add select clauses for performance-critical operations

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: Timestamp ordering assumes consistent database clock
gotchas_discovered.description: Default sorting by createdAt assumes database and application servers have synchronized clocks
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Ensure database and app servers are time-synchronized; consider ID-based pagination for large datasets

gotchas_discovered.description: Update operations lack version fields for conflict detection in concurrent scenarios
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Add version field to entities and increment on updates for optimistic locking

approach_outcome.description: Successfully created BaseRepository abstract class with comprehensive multi-tenant support and CRUD operations
key_accomplishments: Implemented full CRUD operations (Create, Read, Update, Delete, Restore)
Enforced multi-tenant isolation via organizationId filtering on all queries
Integrated soft delete pattern with optional retrieval of deleted records
Implemented pagination with metadata (total, page count, current page)
Added sorting capability with customizable sort fields and order
Created comprehensive interfaces (BaseEntity, PaginationParams, SortParams, QueryParams, PaginatedResult, TenantContext)
Provided transaction wrapper methods for batch operations
Added performance optimizations (parallel Promise.all for count+find, batch operations)
Included extensive JSDoc documentation with examples for all methods
Used TypeScript generics for type-safe entity/input handling

recommendations.recommendation: Add modelName validation in constructor to catch invalid model names early rather than at runtime
recommendations.rationale: Current @ts-expect-error suppression masks type errors; runtime validation would prevent silent failures

recommendations.recommendation: Implement query projection/select support to allow child repositories to fetch only needed fields
recommendations.rationale: Current implementation fetches all fields for every query, which is inefficient for large entities with many columns

recommendations.recommendation: Add optimistic locking support with version fields for concurrent update scenarios
recommendations.rationale: Current update operations lack conflict detection, which could lead to lost updates in high-concurrency scenarios

recommendations.recommendation: Add cursor-based pagination as alternative to offset pagination for better performance on large datasets
recommendations.rationale: Offset pagination becomes slow with large skip values; cursor-based pagination is more efficient

recommendations.recommendation: Implement query filtering interface to support complex filter conditions (AND, OR, comparison operators)
recommendations.rationale: Current implementation only supports basic equality filtering; advanced filtering would improve reusability

recommendations.recommendation: Add audit logging for sensitive operations (create, update, delete) with user/timestamp tracking
recommendations.rationale: Multi-tenant systems require audit trails for compliance and security monitoring

recommendations.recommendation: Create comprehensive test suite for BaseRepository to validate tenant isolation and soft delete behavior
recommendations.rationale: BaseRepository is critical infrastructure; tests would catch edge cases and prevent regressions

recommendations.recommendation: Add input sanitization/validation helper methods to prevent SQL injection through dynamic model names
recommendations.rationale: While modelName comes from controlled sources, explicit validation would follow defense-in-depth principle

recommendations.recommendation: Add migration guide for existing repositories to extend BaseRepository and leverage multi-tenant support
recommendations.rationale: Clear migration path would accelerate adoption across the codebase

recommendations.recommendation: Consider adding caching layer support (Redis) for frequently accessed entities with cache invalidation strategy
recommendations.rationale: Multi-tenant systems often have hot data; caching would improve response times for frequently queried entities
